To: glebius@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: RE: misc/184010: FreeBSD 10.0-BETA3  sysctl -a dumps
X-Mailer: Microsoft Outlook 14.0

I tried to rebuild the ALPHA5 kernel, but after the svn update to 258356 it
is hanging on 
fatal error: 'yp.h' file not found     and there is nothing in the readme
about that file. 


----- End forwarded message -----
